result.reason: The issue describes poor UI rendering on 4K monitors, indicating a lack of proper high DPI scaling, which needs to be addressed for modern display compatibility.
result.approach: Implement high DPI awareness in the application manifest and adjust UI forms and controls to scale correctly on high-resolution (4K) displays.
